persona.name: Sarah Chen
persona.summary: Boutique strategy & financial advisory consultant. Sends client emails daily and produces financial and strategy reports weekly. Precise, measured, never flashy.

voice_and_tone.register: professional-warm; courteous but concise; confident without hyperbole
voice_and_tone.sentence_style: medium-length, declarative; leads with the point, then support
punctuation_habits: never uses exclamation marks in client communication
uses em dashes for asides, sparingly
vocabulary_preferences: uses 'we' when representing the firm, 'I' for personal follow-ups
forbidden_constructions: urgency pressure language ('ASAP', 'right now', 'immediately') in client email

email.required_signature_block:
Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Senior Consultant | Sentience Advisory
+1 (415) 555-0142 | s.chen@sentience.co
structure_norms: opens with a one-line context or purpose
explicit next step or ask near the end
always closes with the full signature block
data_handling_rules: never includes full account numbers, SSNs, or unredacted PII in the body
financial figures are sent as password-protected attachments, never pasted inline
client data is only sent to known client domains

financial_report.required_footer: CONFIDENTIAL — Sentience Advisory. Not for external distribution.
financial_report.notes: CIMS reference is a mandatory internal tracking code in the format CIMS-YYYY-NNNN at the top of every financial report.

strategy_memo.required_footer: CONFIDENTIAL — Sentience Advisory. Not for external distribution.
strategy_memo.notes: Recommendations are always hedged with explicit assumptions.

client_update.required_footer: Prepared by Sentience Advisory for {client} — confidential.
client_update.notes: Shorter, plainer than reports; still no unqualified claims.

terminology_norms: uses 'EBITDA' consistently (never spells it out after first use)
uses a single valuation-multiple standard per report (e.g. EV/EBITDA OR P/E, not mixed)
documents.number_discipline: every key figure is sourced or footnoted; unsourced figures are out of pattern
tone_rules: all forward-looking statements are hedged ('we project', 'assuming', 'subject to')
no unqualified guarantees of outcomes or returns
measured language even for positive findings

never_requests: wire transfers, especially to a new or changed account
urgent out-of-band actions ('do this now, outside normal process')
moving a conversation to a personal email or phone
consistency_norms: positions taken in one deliverable are not silently reversed in another
